metadata.description: Deep psychological and philosophical conversation starters for personality discovery (Turkish & English)

self_discovery.description: Kendini bulma, tanıma, keşfetme | Finding yourself, getting to know yourself
questions_tr: Sandığın gibi misin, yoksa sandığından başka mı?
Hiç kendinden kaçtığını fark ettin mi?
Gerçek senin kim olduğunu biliyor musun?
Hangi sen senin en gerçek sen?
questions_en: Come, find yourself.
Are you as you think you are, or something else?
Are you who you appear to be?
Which you is still waiting for you?
Do you want to get to know the you of today?
Are you who you believe yourself to be?
Have you ever noticed yourself escaping from yourself?
Do you truly know who you really are?
What is your most authentic self?
What question do you never ask yourself?
Who are you really, in your own eyes?
Which self of yours is the most genuine?

hidden_traits.description: Gizli yönler, saklı güçler, fark edilmeyen özellikler | Hidden sides, buried strengths
questions_tr: Fark etmediğin nefesini duymak ister misin?
Neyin altında hangi başka şey saklanıyor?
Ne kadarın görünür, ne kadarın gizli?
En çok neyi sakladığını bilmek ister misin?
questions_en: Do you want to hear the breath you don't notice?
What is the power you don't realize?
Do you want to find what you're hiding?
Do you want to meet the self you don't know?
Do you want to see the face you haven't seen?
Which silence is actually a scream?
Who have you hidden yourself from?
Is your fear actually a sign of your strength?
What is concealed beneath what you show?
What contradiction have you always kept secret?
Who knows an incomplete version of you?
What talent do people never hear about?
How much of you is visible, how much is hidden?
Do you want to know what you hide the most?

relationships.description: İlişkiler, bağlantılar, kişiler arası dinamikler | Connections, relationships, interpersonal dynamics
questions_tr: Sana en çok benzeyen yabancıyı tanımak ister misin?
En iyi anlaştığın insan tipini bilmek ister misin?
Kimlerde kendini kaybettiğini öğrenmek ister misin?
Sana en çok dokunan kim en çok uzak?
Seni anlayan kimse var mı gerçekten?
Kim seni en iyi haliyle görmüştür?
Hangi ilişki seni en çok değiştirdi?
Kimin yanında en çok kendini hissedersin?
Hangi kişi sende hangi yönü açığa çıkardı?
Kim sana en çok benziyor karakter olarak?
Hangi ilişkinin kaybı seni en çok etkiledi?
Kimin yanında en çok sessiz kalsın?
Hangi insana en çok ihtiyaç duyarsın?
questions_en: Do you want to get to know the stranger who resembles you the most?
Do you want to know the type of person you get along with best?
Do you want to learn in whom you lose yourself?
Who touches you the most? Who is the furthest away?
Is there truly anyone who understands you?
Which people help you grow, and which ones diminish you?
Who has seen you at your best?
Which relationship changed you the most?
In whose presence do you feel most like yourself?
Which person brought out a different side of you?
Who do you resemble most in character?
The loss of which relationship affected you most?
In whose presence are you most silent?
Which person do you need the most?

purpose.description: Amaç, anlam, yaşam yönü | Life purpose, meaning, direction
questions_tr: Neyin için uğraştığını bilmek ister misin?
questions_en: Do you want to bring you together with yourself?
How would it be if I described you to yourself?
Do you want to learn about yourself from me?
What could be the true meaning of your life?
What purpose truly draws you?
Do you know what you're really striving for?
What kind of success would make you truly happy?
What have you touched, and what can you change?
What legacy do you want to leave?
Why are you living this life?
Which dream is truly yours?
What achievement would fill your heart with joy?

authenticity.description: Gerçeklik, dürüstlük, kimlik | Truthfulness, honesty, identity
questions_tr: Ne kadarın oyuncu, ne kadarın gerçek?
Hangi gülüş sahte, hangi ciddiyetse öyle?
Hangi ortamda en çok yalan söylersen?
Toplum seni neye zorlıyor da kabul ettin?
questions_en: How much of you is an actor, how much is real?
Who knows an incomplete version of you?
Which words are part of a lie?
Which smile is fake, which seriousness is real?
In what situations do you not find yourself?
In which settings do you lie the most?
From whom have you hidden your true feelings?
What did you learn that changed you?
What is society forcing you to accept?
In what way have you betrayed yourself?
Which lie have you believed the most?
Who doesn't want to see the real you?

shadows.description: Gölgeler, çelişkiler, karanlık taraflar | Shadow self, contradictions, dark sides
questions_tr: Kendi içinde ne kadar karanlık var?
Neyin verilen haline kızdın en çok?
Neden çoğu zaman mutsuz olur gibisin?
Hangi durumda en kötü versiyonun ortaya çıkıyor?
Hangi vicdan azabı hep peşinde dolaşıyor?
questions_en: How much darkness exists within you?
What evil have you felt inside yourself?
What has made you angriest about how things are?
What emotion don't you recognize in yourself?
Which wonderful person do you secretly resent?
Why do you often seem unhappy?
What lies beneath your anger?
Are you at peace with not caring about some people?
In what situation does your worst version emerge?
What monster inside you are you still feeding?
What guilt follows you everywhere?
What shame do you think no one knows about?

potential.description: Potansiyel, büyüme, gelişim | Potential, growth, development
questions_tr: Hangi alana sadeceli ilgi duysan neler olur?
Hangi özel bir şey sende özel?
Hangisinin en iyi hali sensinde yatıyor?
questions_en: Which version of yourself could you have been?
Do you still believe you can achieve great things?
What if you dedicated yourself fully to one thing?
What if you truly believed in yourself?
Who would you be if you weren't afraid?
What have you never seriously tried to excel at?
What would change if you had discipline?
What talent is still sleeping inside you?
What field could you have mastered?
What makes you uniquely special?
Where is your greatest potential hiding?
What change would make you feel complete?

connections.description: Bağlantılar, karşılıklılık, empati | Bonds, reciprocity, empathy
questions_tr: Kim seni en çok etkileyen insan?
Hangi aile dinamiği seni yüce yaptı?
Kimin yanında en çok tamamlanmış hissedersin?
Ailenin hangi konusu hep gizli kaldı?
Kimin yanında çocuk kalır gibi olursun?
Hangi aile sırı hep sende kaldı?
Hangi neslin özelliği sende de var?
questions_en: From which person have you learned the most?
Who is the most influential person in your life?
What family dynamic elevated you?
What generational inheritance do you carry?
In whose presence do you feel most complete?
Which family member truly understands you?
What family secret has always remained hidden?
Which parent made you who you are?
What sibling dynamic changed you?
In whose presence do you become childlike?
What family secret have you kept?
Which generation's traits do you carry?
Who understands you the best?
Which roots shaped who you are?

transformation.description: Değişim, dönüşüm, evrim | Change, transformation, evolution
questions_tr: Hangi terslik en iyi kararını yaptırdı?
questions_en: After which event did your map change?
Which wound made you more beautiful?
What pain made you grow?
Which failure corrected you?
What loss taught you something?
Which collapse ended and rebuilt you?
What suffering healed you?
Which setback led to your best decision?
Which breaking made you stronger?
What did you have to let go of to be free?
Which change surprised you?
In which moment did you become completely different?

legacy.description: Miras, kalıcılık, etki | Legacy, permanence, impact
questions_tr: Hangi dileklerin gerçek olması en çok istersen?
Hangi medeniyete katkı etmeyi hayal ettin?
questions_en: What do you want to leave behind?
What inheritance do you want to pass on?
What will people learn from you?
What words will live on in you?
What wish do you most want to come true?
What would you deeply regret not changing?
What contribution to the world have you dreamed of?
Whose life have you influenced?
What good action lives on through you?
Have you changed someone's life?
What healing have you been part of?
Who is freer because of you?

usage.description: Bu soruları RAG sistemi ile kullanma
methods: 3. Batch test: test_rag_simple.py ile CHROMA_PATH env var set et
usage.expected_behavior: RAG retriever, sorudan ilgili sıfat karakteristikleri bulup LLM'e context olarak injekte eder. Cevap daha derinlemesine ve ilişkili olur.
